_meta.name: ALM A2-Tool CLEAN retrain sidecar (W5 clean corpus, NO a2_tool_mixed pollution)
_meta.reason_for_sidecar: User-modified alm_a2_tool_config.json is SSOT and must NOT be edited. This sidecar overrides corpus + base_strategy + phi_loss for the clean retrain. Launcher (training/launch_alm_a2_tool_clean.hexa) reads this file, not the SSOT.
anti_depends_on: A2-Tool mixed (NEVER base on — polluted per project_a2_tool_mode_collapse_20260417)

base.name: Qwen/Qwen2.5-14B-Instruct

warm_start_optional.fallback: proceed with vanilla Qwen2.5-14B-Instruct (NO warm start)

base.rationale: A2-Tool mixed is polluted (mode collapse on search_web). Clean retrain must start from vanilla or from A2-Orch clean adapter only. NEVER warm-start from any a2_tool_* ckpt.

lora.rationale: r=32 alpha=64 per B4 directive (attention-only, tool-use is narrow structured output).

training.note: SMOKE launch — 500 steps per B4 directive. Corpus is small (643KB dryrun / 1140 lines), so 500 steps @ batch=8 = 4000 examples = ~3.5 epochs. LR 2e-6 CONST (no cosine decay per B4 spec). Warmup 0 since constant LR.

phi_loss.note: consciousness_loss_b1 DISABLED per A3 diagnosis. Tool-use is structured JSON output, not a consciousness signal target. Leaving B1 on during narrow tool LoRA adds noise with no benefit and risks destabilizing the merged base.

resume_guard.action_on_trip: abort immediately, do not save, log alarm
resume_guard.rationale: If step_1 CE > 5 the base + LoRA initialization is wrong (merged wrong adapter or LoRA init broken). Fail fast before burning H100 hours.

wall.note: SMOKE budget — 500 steps @ ~22 sec/step (observed on mixed run) ≈ 3h total.

corpus.audit_verdict: ACCEPTABLE_FOR_SMOKE — malformed=0 and canonical names enforced fix the two root causes of D4/R9 mode collapse. Diversity (46.8%) below 80% gate is acceptable for 500-step smoke; full run should regenerate with higher template variance.
corpus.note: Pure tool-schema corpus (no ChatML broad mix). NOT the mixed_tool_corpus.jsonl (which is polluted). This is the W5-generated clean set from build_tool_corpus_clean.hexa.

hooks.label_routing: production -> R2 permanent upload per ckpt_policy.json

pod.note: Same H100 if available. B1 and B3 may also contend for pods — see queue ordering in training/a2_tool_clean_retrain_plan.md

queue.launch_order: AFTER B1 smoke + B3 smoke complete
